code:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data=None):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None

def reverse_linked_list(head):
    prev = None
    current = head
    while current is not None:
        next_node = current.next
        current.next = prev
        prev = current
        current = next_node
    return prev

# Örnek kullanım (isteğe bağlı, fonksiyonu test etmek için)
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Bağlı listeyi oluşturma: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5
    head = Node(1)
    head.next = Node(2)
    head.next.next = Node(3)
    head.next.next.next = Node(4)
    head.next.next.next.next = Node(5)

    print("Orijinal liste:")
    current = head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print()

    # Listeyi ters çevirme
    new_head = reverse_linked_list(head)

    print("Ters çevrilmiş liste:")
    current = new_head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print()

    # Boş liste testi
    empty_head = None
    print("\nBoş liste (orijinal):")
    current = empty_head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print("Boş")

    reversed_empty_head = reverse_linked_list(empty_head)
    print("Boş liste (ters çevrilmiş):")
    current = reversed_empty_head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print("Boş")

    # Tek elemanlı liste testi
    single_node_head = Node(10)
    print("\nTek elemanlı liste (orijinal):")
    current = single_node_head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print()

    reversed_single_node_head = reverse_linked_list(single_node_head)
    print("Tek elemanlı liste (ters çevrilmiş):")
    current = reversed_single_node_head
    while current:
        print(current.data, end=" -> " if current.next else "")
        current = current.next
    print()
